3180890.name: RPG Maker MZ - NATHUHARUCA Green Tilesets
3180890.description:
This amazing collection includes a diverse range of tiles featuring lush green landscapes and detailed objects, allowing you to create a wide variety of maps!
You will find 15 unique designs, 2 color options, different sizes, symmetrical versions, and diagonal angles, offering endless creative possibilities.
Additionally, the images are divided into parts for added flexibility in your designs.
With a total of 67 PNG images, this tile set is an absolute treasure trove for your projects!

Contents
tilesets: 67

-----

・This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
・OK to be used in Commercial projects made in RPG Maker
・You may modify some of the assets (but not redistribute them) for your own game use only.
